rationale: Cross-channel comparator module implements SKN comparison logic
Safe state manager module implements SKN safe state authority
Departure interlock module implements SKN interlock logic
Memory integrity module implements SKN CRC and stack canary checks
CAN speed receiver module implements SPM TCMS interface
Speed validator module implements SPM CRC and timeout logic
Interlock generator module implements SPM interlock flag management
Obstacle sensor reader implements OBD GPIO and ISR interface
Obstacle detector implements OBD 1oo2 detection logic
Reversal command generator implements OBD motor reversal authority
Door FSM engine implements per-door state machine
Sensor voter implements DSM 2oo2 position and lock voting
Lock controller implements DSM lock actuator commands
Motor controller implements DSM PWM and direction commands
Mode manager implements DSM operational mode FSM
Fault aggregator implements FMG fault flag collection
Fault classifier implements FMG severity classification
Safe state escalator implements FMG safe state trigger
CAN receiver implements TCI CAN RX with CRC validation
CAN transmitter implements TCI CAN TX with CRC generation
Command parser implements TCI door command decoding
Status formatter implements TCI door status encoding
Event log writer implements DGN circular buffer management
Event log reader implements DGN diagnostic port interface
Log CRC generator implements DGN per-entry CRC-16
GPIO driver implements HAL sensor and actuator interface
PWM driver implements HAL motor control (20kHz)
CAN driver implements HAL bxCAN interface
SPI driver implements HAL cross-channel and Flash SPI
CRC-16-CCITT utility provides polynomial 0x1021 computation
TCI→SPM speed message interface uses CAN receiver output
SPM→SKN speed interlock interface uses interlock generator output
SPM→DSM speed gate interface shares interlock flag with IF-002
HAL→DSM sensor inputs use GPIO driver output arrays
HAL→OBD obstacle sensors use GPIO driver ISR and polling
OBD→DSM obstacle flags use obstacle detector output
OBD→SKN obstacle state for cross-channel comparison
DSM→SKN door and lock states from FSM engine
DSM→TCI per-door status via status formatter
DSM→HAL lock actuator commands via lock controller
DSM→HAL motor PWM commands via motor controller
FMG→SKN fault flags from fault aggregator
FMG→TCI fault report via CAN transmitter
FMG→DGN fault log entries to event writer
SKN→ALL safe state broadcast from safe state manager
SKN→TCI departure interlock from interlock module
SKN(ChA)↔SKN(ChB) cross-channel SPI via comparator
TCI→DSM door commands from command parser
HAL→SKN watchdog status (implicit in GPIO driver)
DGN→SPI Flash event log via HAL SPI driver
Unified CRC polynomial implemented in HAL CRC utility
3-cycle SPI infrastructure fault filter in comparator
cross_channel_state_t structure defined in tdc_types.h
door_fsm_state_t enumeration with 9 states
error_t return codes for all safety functions
